name: Personalized Recommendation
description: Users want diverse and fresh music recommendations, not repetitive songs. They want an algorithm that understands their preferences.

name: Intuitive Music Discovery
description: Users struggle with Gaana's cluttered design and want a more straightforward discovery process. They want to easily find new music and artists.
example_phrase: confusing design with too many buttons

name: Break Algorithm Echo Chamber
description: Users feel trapped in a loop of repetitive songs and ads. They want an app that suggests new music based on their preferences and mood.

name: More Diverse Music Recommendations
description: Users want an app that suggests a wide range of music genres and artists. They get bored with the same old recommendations.

name: Seamless Music Playback
description: Users want uninterrupted music playback without ads or subscription prompts. They want to enjoy their music without interruptions.
